title: AeroFlame
description: AeroFlame focuses on adding abilities to Jetray and reworking Swampfire.
body:
# Description:

AeroFlame focuses on adding abilities to Jetray and reworking Swampfire.

**If you want to use jetray ad astra ability you need to have cheats enabled.**

# Obtainment:

## Swampfire:
- Right click blaze with a red tulip flower to get torchflower.
- Place the torchflower on ground and right click it with blaze powder.
- Hold the Methanosian Flower in your offhand and right click.


## Jetray:
- Obtain the Wing Bone by killing Phantoms (1/10 chance to get one, 1/1,5 chance with looting 3)
- Visit a Cleric and buy the Aerophibian Wing from him (You need 2 wing bones and 16 emeralds, the cleric must be level 2)
- Hold the Aerophibian Wing in your offhand and right click.
  
# Abilities:

## Swampfire:

- Vine Manipulation: Generation
- Flame hands (Enables flame type moves)
- Bonemeal
- Seed throw
- Vine Generation: Spikes
- Methane explosion
- Fire jump
- Flame thrower
- Fireball

## Jetray:

- Adjustable flight speed (like xlr8 running)
- Eye beam
- Neuroshock laser
- Triple beam
- Ground slam
- Hyperspace (lets you go to a dimension where you can fly how fast you want without breaking Minecraft chunk generation (Coordinates are the same as overworld so you can just paste your waypoints there or smth))

### Special thanks to:

- Quill for helping me with kubejs scripts.
- AmiSlayz for making item textures.
- Zaalhir and beans for torturing me in to making an stand-alone addon.

# Disclaimer:
All of those reworks are already in ⁠Omnitrix Evolution Addon they were made by me when I was a dev. I got asked a lot to make them a separate addon so here it is. If you already use ⁠Omnitrix Evolution Addon then no need to download this because this adds nothing if you already use OE.
